titleStmt.title: SII 29.341: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 341. (A.R. No. B. 522 of 1961-62.) HĪRĀPUR, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup on the wall of Gautappa well.
It speaks of excavation of a well, construction of a choultry and development of a garden for public use by Gautama of Kāśyapa-gōtra, a resident of Hīrāpura. These were dedicated to the god Śrī-Rāma.

The record gives the dates of commencement and completion of the works of excavating the dharmasarōvavara (1) Śaka 1651 (wrong for 1653) Virōdhikrit, Chaitra. śu. 5 corresponding to 1731 A.D., and (2) Śaka 1656, Pramādi, Māgha śu. 13 corresponding to 1734 A.D., February 5, Tuesday, March 31 [Wednesday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . chā(śā)radāyainamaḥ śaraṇāgatadēvārti haraṇaṁ śaraṇaṁ mama . Āyurārōgyadaṁ vaṁde .
śrī manmātāṁḍa bhairavaṁ . śrī matkāśyapa gōtra saṁtati gautama nāmadhēyaḥ hirāpure vasata dharmārtha vinirmita .
dharmasarōvara dharmaśāḷā dharmavanāni sakaḷaḷōka sukhāya . svasti śrī nṛpa śālivāhana śake 1651 ne
ya virōdhikṛtunāma saṁvatsare caitra śu(kla 5 myāṁ) dharma sarōvara prāraṁbhaḥ . śake 1656 neya pramādināma .
saṁvatsare māgha śukla trayōdaśyāṁ samāpti mabhavat maṁgaḷa māhēśvarī śubhaṁ bhavatu śrī rāmārpaṇa mastu .
rāma rāmēti rāmeti rame same manōrame . sahasranāmatatulyaṁ śrī rāmanāma varānane . namaḥ śivāya .
Digital edition of SII 29.341 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
